reviews.comment:
Por favor no pidan tartas. No sé si habrá sido un mal día, pero estaban agrias y muy caras. No llegamos a terminarlas. Buena atención del personal y los baños estaban aceptables.

(Translated by Google)
Please don't order cakes. I don't know if it was just a bad day, but they were sour and very expensive. We didn't even finish them. The staff were friendly and the restrooms were acceptable.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNkaGVDNUlREAE
